home.heroTitle: CarPlay & Android Auto for your VW Up, Seat Mii or Skoda Citigo
home.heroTitleHighlight: VW Up, Seat Mii or Skoda Citigo
home.heroSubtitle: 11.25" wireless CarPlay screen with built-in 4K dashcam. Plug & play installation in under 5 minutes.
home.transformSubtitle: From standard dashboard to CarPlay integration
home.review1Text: Super happy with the screen in my VW Up! CarPlay works wirelessly and the installation literally took 3 minutes. Truly plug & play.
home.review2Text: Finally CarPlay in my Seat Mii. The screen looks gorgeous and the 4K dashcam is a nice bonus. Very satisfied!
home.review3Text: Easiest upgrade ever for my Citigo. Screen is bright, responsive, and the sound quality via Bluetooth is excellent.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our CarPlay screens.
faq.q1: Does the screen fit my car?
faq.a1: Our screens are specifically designed for the VW Up (2011–2023), Seat Mii (2011–2023) and Skoda Citigo (2011–2023). Use our selector to find the right screen for your car based on build year and dashboard configuration.
faq.a2: Most configurations are fully plug & play — you simply clip the screen onto your dashboard. For facelift models with phone holder, installation takes less than 5 minutes. Pre-facelift models with Garmin require a build-in kit.
faq.a3: Yes! The screen supports wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto via Bluetooth 5.0 and WiFi. After the initial pairing, your phone automatically connects when you get in the car.
faq.q4: Does the screen have a dashcam?
faq.a4: Yes, every screen has a built-in 4K dashcam (3840 x 2160) that automatically records when the screen is on. Footage is stored on a microSD card (sold separately).
faq.a5: Orders within the Netherlands are delivered within 1-3 business days. Shipping to Belgium and Germany takes 2-4 business days. Other European countries 3-7 business days. You will receive a tracking code once your order has been shipped.
faq.a6: Yes, you have a 14-day return period from receipt. The product must be unused and in its original packaging. After we receive the return, the purchase amount will be refunded within 5 business days.
faq.a7: All our screens come with a 1-year warranty covering manufacturing defects under normal use. The warranty does not cover damage from incorrect installation or physical damage.
faq.q8: Can I customize the startup logo?
faq.a8: Yes! With every order you can choose from different startup logos: Standard, E-UP, GTI, VW, Seat or Skoda. The GTI logo costs €35 extra, other variants €25 extra.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.introText: These general terms and conditions apply to all offers, orders, and agreements of UpCarPlay, based in Amsterdam and registered with the Chamber of Commerce. By placing an order, you accept these terms.
terms.definitionsText: In these terms: 'UpCarPlay' refers to the seller of the products; 'Customer' refers to the natural or legal person placing an order; 'Product' refers to the CarPlay screens and accessories offered through the webshop; 'Agreement' refers to the purchase agreement between UpCarPlay and the Customer.
terms.ordersText: An agreement is established when you receive an order confirmation by email. UpCarPlay reserves the right to refuse orders or request additional information. Prices include VAT unless otherwise stated.
terms.shippingText: UpCarPlay aims to ship orders within 1-3 business days. Delivery times are indicative and not binding deadlines. Risk of the product transfers to the customer upon delivery. Shipping costs are clearly indicated before completing the order.
terms.returnsText: You have the right to cancel the agreement within 14 days of receiving the product without giving any reason. The product must be returned unused, undamaged, and in its original packaging. Return shipping costs are at the customer's expense. The purchase amount will be refunded within 14 days of receiving the return.
terms.warrantyText: All products come with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects. The warranty does not apply in cases of improper use, unprofessional installation, or damage from external causes. For warranty claims, please contact us through our contact form.
terms.liabilityText: UpCarPlay's liability is limited to the amount covered by insurance in the relevant case, or to a maximum of the invoice amount of the order in question. UpCarPlay is not liable for indirect damage, consequential damage, or damage caused by incorrect installation.
terms.privacyText: UpCarPlay processes personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). Personal data is used exclusively for processing orders and is not shared with third parties unless necessary for the execution of the agreement.
terms.amendmentsText: UpCarPlay reserves the right to amend these general terms and conditions. Amended terms apply to new orders. The most current version is always available on our website.
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, you can contact us through the contact form on our website.
